message:
🐛 fix: reword misleading 'Broadcast success' comment in self-upgrade (#8045) (#8048)

The comment at self_upgrade.go:424 said 'Broadcast success', but the
emitted event is a 'running' progress update (step 2 / 60%), not a
terminal success event. Reworded to reflect the actual semantics — the
real success broadcast happens once the deployment rollout completes.

Comment-only change, no behavior change.

Fixes #8045

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
